title: Calm
description: Prep your skin before makeup with this hydrating skin primer, made with beautifully softening ingredients.
ingredients: Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil (Organic Jojoba Oil)
Theobroma Cacao Seed Butter (Fair Trade Organic Cocoa Butter)

images.alt: A close-up product swatch of a thick, teardrop-shaped dollop of Calm primer. The product has a creamy, smooth texture and a pale, yellowish-ivory color,

An angled product shot of a black spray bottle of LUSH Calm Face Primer, standing on a reflective surface. A creamy white swatch of the product rests next to the bottle and its reflection, all against a bright blue background.

A close-up vertical portrait of a smiling person with dark hair, looking up and left. Their chin rests on their hand, and their face has a healthy, radiant sheen from the application of the Calm primer, set against a bright blue background.

A close-up vertical shot of a smiling person with dark hair, applying a creamy white swatch of Calm primer to their cheek with a finger. The product is being blended into their skin, set against a bright blue background.
A close-up vertical portrait of a smiling person with dark hair, winking while holding the small black bottle of LUSH Calm Face Primer up to their cheek. The background is a bright blue.
